{"findings": [{"file_path": "src/revue/core/models.py", "line_number": 41, "severity": "low", "issue": "The agent_name field has an empty string default (''), but the code that consumes it uses .get('agent_name', '') which suggests the field might be missing from older findings. {"findings": [{"file_path": "src/revue/cli.py", "line_number": 614, "severity": "info", "issue": "Display logic for agent name + category label is duplicated across _format_finding (line 614) and _run_per_issue_dedup (line 886). {"findings": [{"file_path": "src/revue/core/models.py", "line_number": 41, "severity": "info", "issue": "The agent_name field is added as a string with empty default, but there is no validation that it matches a known agent. The field is tightly coupled to the CLI's _AGENT_DISPLAY_NAMES mapping.", "suggestion": "Consider adding a validator or using an Enum for agent_name to restrict it to known agents. Alternatively, document the contract clearly: agent_name should only be set by LoadedAgent and must match an entry in the agent registry. If using Enum, update the CLI mapping to derive from it. This improves type safety and catches configuration errors early.", "confidence": 0.72, "category": "architecture", "agent_name": "leo"}]}
